property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\alfih\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\alfih\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\alfih\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\alfih\AppData\Local\Python\bin;.

testcase.name: shouldRejectLoanWhenCreditScoreLow
testcase.system-out: 21:23:08.943 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - === createLoan() dipanggil === 21:23:08.954 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower verified: true, creditScore: 400, amount: 5000 21:23:08.954 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower lolos validasi KYC 21:23:08.954 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Amount lolos validasi: 5000 21:23:08.957 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - Loan object berhasil dibuat, status awal: PENDING 21:23:08.957 [main] WARN com.p2p.service.LoanService - Loan REJECTED - credit score 400 < threshold 600 21:23:08.957 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - createLoan() selesai, status akhir: REJECTED

testcase.name: shouldApproveLoanWhenCreditScoreHigh
testcase.system-out: 21:23:08.980 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - === createLoan() dipanggil === 21:23:08.981 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower verified: true, creditScore: 700, amount: 5000 21:23:08.981 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower lolos validasi KYC 21:23:08.981 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Amount lolos validasi: 5000 21:23:08.981 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - Loan object berhasil dibuat, status awal: PENDING 21:23:08.981 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - Loan APPROVED - credit score 700 >= threshold 600 21:23:08.982 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - createLoan() selesai, status akhir: APPROVED

testcase.name: shouldRejectLoanWhenAmountIsZeroOrNegative
testcase.system-out: 21:23:08.990 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - === createLoan() dipanggil === 21:23:08.990 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower verified: true, creditScore: 700, amount: 0 21:23:08.990 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower lolos validasi KYC 21:23:08.992 [main] ERROR com.p2p.service.LoanService - GAGAL: Amount tidak valid -> 0 21:23:08.992 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - === createLoan() dipanggil === 21:23:08.992 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower verified: true, creditScore: 700, amount: -500 21:23:08.992 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower lolos validasi KYC 21:23:08.992 [main] ERROR com.p2p.service.LoanService - GAGAL: Amount tidak valid -> -500

testcase.name: shouldRejectLoanWhenBorrowerNotVerified
testcase.system-out: 21:23:08.997 [main] INFO com.p2p.service.LoanService - === createLoan() dipanggil === 21:23:08.998 [main] DEBUG com.p2p.service.LoanService - Borrower verified: false, creditScore: 700, amount: 1000 21:23:08.998 [main] ERROR com.p2p.service.LoanService - GAGAL: Borrower belum terverifikasi (KYC = false)
